title: AI4Math: A CLI Agent for AI-Assisted Mathematical Research
description: AI4Math is an open-source CLI agent for AI-assisted mathematical research. It is inference-agnostic — any LLM backend can be plugged in — and supports modular retriever substitution; by default, context augmentation is provided through scilibai.ru. The agent integrates Lean 4 proof verification, Mathlib premise retrieval, PDF reading, and web search inside an interactive REPL. Developed for the Yandex School of Data Analysis (YSDA) "AI4Math Intensive" course. Cross-platform: Linux, macOS, and Windows (WSL2 / native beta).
